title: MOTEL SHELTER - 211info
text: CHESTNUT TREE INN MOTEL MOTEL SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides waitlist based motel shelter for individuals experiencing homelessness. Eligibility: Current residents of Gresham Women's Shelter screened via a risk assessment Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week for current participants. 11:30pm curfew, but accommodations can be made if job-related. Email (503) 255-4444 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 255-4444 Reception Chestnut Tree Lobby Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: No self-referral, placement is done via Gresham Women's Shelter FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Women Community Shelters * Pregnant Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
